calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-02-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclaire.
Steven Mains, Esq. for Plaintiff: Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., a national banking association.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: At Your Service, Inc., a corporation as follows:
Damages $55,351.55
Prejudgment Interest $2,397.94
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Costs $492.84
Late Charges $448.48, for a total of $61,515.81
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2005 Continued To Jun-24-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
